councilEnforcement.note: Percentage of English councils with active pavement parking enforcement powers (byelaw or TRO-based)

complaints.note: Pavement parking complaints reported to local councils and police in England

disabledPeopleAffected.note: Percentage of disabled people who say pavement parking affects their ability to get around

metadata.methodology: Council enforcement figures from DfT survey of local authorities and Freedom of Information requests. Complaint volumes from combined LGA survey data. Disabled people impact figures from Disability Rights UK and Living Streets surveys.
knownIssues: No national enforcement database exists — figures compiled from surveys and FoI requests
Pavement parking definition varies: some councils only enforce where footway width is below 1.5m
Scotland banned pavement parking nationally in 2023; England figures exclude Scotland
